pullRequest.title: DOM-54099 - test refactor - AI gateway - API endpoint test fail

nodes.body:
these are negation tests which will wait the maximum time every time AND may pass if something else goes wrong.
Instead can you turn it into positive tests so that we don't incur the timeout cost every time and fail if something else goes wrong?

commit c68fe8bb867728da068fa97e6d289ad4fd712158 (HEAD -> DOM-54099, origin/DOM-54099)
Author: ddl-abishek <abishek.subramanian@dominodatalab.com>
Date:   Thu Mar 21 13:48:01 2024 -0400

    checking response dict instead of assertion/response errors

Since this is combining tests, I think we should give the reader hints for each section verified

```suggestion

     * # Verify embedding
     When I wait to click the button "test_llm_endpoints.py --endpoint_name embeddings_test"
      And I wait to click the tab "Results"
     Then I wait to see the text "dict_keys(['object', 'data', 'model', 'usage'])"

     * # Verify chat
     When I wait to click the button "test_llm_endpoints.py --endpoint_name chat2_test"
      And I wait to click the tab "Results"
     Then I wait to see the text "dict_keys(['id', 'object', 'created', 'model', 'choices', 'usage'])"

     * # Verify access error using chat
     When I wait to click the button "test_llm_endpoints.py --endpoint_name chat_test"
      And I wait to click the tab "Results"
      * # Response error is deliberate because the user does not have permissions to access the chat_test endpoint
     Then I wait to see the text "Response Error 400 Client Error"
      And I wait to see the text "Cannot access endpoint chat_test_{SCENARIO_RUN_ID}"

     * # Verify completion
     When I wait to click the button "test_llm_endpoints.py --endpoint_name completions_test"
      And I wait to click the tab "Results"
     Then I wait to see the text "dict_keys(['id', 'object', 'created', 'model', 'choices', 'usage'])"
```
